ocr_findings.description: Data warehouse diagram (showing ERP/CRM/SCM databases feeding into データウェアハウス) replaced by img-0.jpeg placeholder. The diagram label 'データウェアハウス' is captured as a caption line in OCR, so the section context is not lost.
Page number '193' at bottom of image is reproduced as '193' at the end of OCR text — correct.

reviewer_notes: Page covers data warehouse characteristics versus ERP/CRM systems, then introduces Big Data (ビッグデータ) and its 3V characteristics. All prose text and bullet points (Volume, Velocity, Variety) faithfully reproduced. Diagram is an image placeholder but prose explains it adequately.
